subject: [PATCH 21/24] nfsd: add the filehandle to returned attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds a new routine to compose a filehandle in the context of a CB_NOTIFY, where there is no export to consult. The routine uses only the parent filehandle and nfs4_file to fill out the fhandle field in the nfsd4_fattr_args. This allows for the return of a filehandle in the attributes of a CB_NOTIFY response.
